languages.text: {n}Обезумевший от боли воин {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} медленно опускается на колени. Его тело все еще подергивается от хаотичных судорог, взгляд направлен прямо перед собой — в своей мучительной покорности он напоминает сломанного {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Обезумевший от боли воин {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} медленно опускается на колени. Его тело все еще подергивается от хаотичных судорог, взгляд направлен прямо перед собой — в своей мучительной покорности он напоминает сломанного {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

{n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Wahnsinnig vor Schmerz, sinkt der Soldat des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} langsam auf die Knie. Während sein Körper noch von Krämpfen geschüttelt wird, ist sein Blick starr nach vorne gerichtet. Er gleicht in seiner schmerzhaften Unterwerfung einem {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Wahnsinnig vor Schmerz, sinkt der Soldat des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} langsam auf die Knie. Während sein Körper noch von Krämpfen geschüttelt wird, ist sein Blick starr nach vorne gerichtet. Er gleicht in seiner schmerzhaften Unterwerfung einem {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Rongé par la douleur, le soldat de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} tombe lentement à genoux, son corps encore secoué de spasmes chaotiques, le regard fixé droit devant lui. Cette forme de soumission n'est pas sans rappeler un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} à l'agonie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Rongé par la douleur, le soldat de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} tombe lentement à genoux, son corps encore secoué de spasmes chaotiques, le regard fixé droit devant lui. Cette forme de soumission n'est pas sans rappeler un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} à l'agonie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}被剧痛折磨逼疯的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}士兵慢慢跪倒在地。他的身体仍在无序地抽搐，目光锁死前方。在这煎熬的屈从之下，他就像一台破损的{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}被剧痛折磨逼疯的{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}士兵慢慢跪倒在地。他的身体仍在无序地抽搐，目光锁死前方。在这煎熬的屈从之下，他就像一台破损的{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Enloquecido por el dolor, el soldado del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} cae de rodillas lentamente. Su cuerpo aún se retuerce por los espasmos y clava la mirada en la distancia. Parece un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} roto presa de una sumisión agónica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Enloquecido por el dolor, el soldado del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} cae de rodillas lentamente. Su cuerpo aún se retuerce por los espasmos y clava la mirada en la distancia. Parece un {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} roto presa de una sumisión agónica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}痛みに狂い、{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}インペリウム{/g} の戦士はゆっくりと膝をつく。彼の体はまだ混沌とした痙攣で痙攣し、彼の視線はまっすぐ前方に固定されている。彼は壊れた{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}サーヴィターに似ている{/g} 彼の苦悶の服従の中で。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} warrior slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonized submission.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Acıdan çıldırmış olan {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} askeri, yavaşça dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor. Bedenindeki kaotik spazmlar devam ediyor, bakışları doğrudan ileriye sabitlenmiş. Izdırap dolu boyun eğişiyle bozuk bir {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetörü{/g} andırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Driven mad by pain, the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} soldier slowly sinks to his knees. His body still twitches with chaotic spasms, his gaze fixed straight ahead. He resembles a broken {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} in his agonised submission.{/n}
